pdf.info: Activate the PDF export engine to render forms as PDF. Formidable adopts a Chrome or Chromium binary already installed on this machine. It does not bundle or download one. If none is detected, install Chrome or Chromium yourself, then re-open this panel.
pdf.field.export_dir.unset: (none, PDFs land next to the form)
pdf.dialog.title: Pick a Chrome / Chromium binary
pdf.dialog.intro: Formidable detected the following candidates. Pick one to activate the PDF export engine.
pdf.dialog.no_candidates: No Chrome or Chromium found on this machine. PDF export needs a real Chrome/Chromium binary, please install one yourself, then click Refresh. Linux: install via your package manager (e.g. `sudo apt install chromium`). macOS / Windows: download Chrome from google.com/chrome.
pdf.doctor.title: PDF doctor: last render results
pdf.doctor.empty: No renders yet in this session.
pdf.export.dialog.title: Export as PDF
pdf.export.dialog.toast.open_failed: PDF saved, but could not open it: {0}
pdf.inject.page.help: Page size, orientation, and margin. Off = picoloom defaults (letter / portrait / 1 inch).
pdf.inject.cover.help: Renders a title page at the top of the document. Pick a template and fill in whichever fields it uses.
pdf.inject.cover.title: Title
pdf.inject.cover.subtitle: Subtitle
pdf.inject.cover.author: Author
pdf.inject.toc.title: Title
pdf.inject.footer.empty_warn: Footer is enabled but has no content. Turn on the page-number toggle or fill at least one field, otherwise the block will be skipped.
pdf.inject.signature.help: Sign-off line. This typically appears at the end of the document.
pdf.inject.signature.name: Name
pdf.inject.signature.title: Title
pdf.inject.signature.empty_warn: Signature is enabled but has no content. Fill at least one field, otherwise the block will be skipped.
pdf.inject.preview.title: Show generated YAML
pdf.covers.info: Edit, add, or delete cover-page templates from the on-disk library. Seed covers (Classic, Banner, Corporate) can be reset to their bundled defaults; user-added covers are deleted permanently.
pdf.covers.list.title: Library
pdf.covers.editor.idle: Pick a cover on the left to edit it, or use New to start one from a working template.
pdf.covers.editor.name: Name
pdf.covers.editor.name_locked: Name is fixed for existing covers. Delete and re-add to rename.
pdf.covers.validation.idle: Validation will run as you type.
pdf.covers.new.dialog.title: New cover
pdf.covers.new.dialog.intro: Name your new cover. Use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens. This becomes the filename and the CSS class.
pdf.covers.new.dialog.name_taken: A cover named “{0}” already exists. Pick a different name.
pdf.covers.new.dialog.invalid: Use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.
pdf.covers.confirm.delete_message: Delete the cover {0}? This removes the file from disk.
pdf.covers.confirm.reset_message: Reset {0} to the bundled default? The file will be removed and rewritten on the next app start.
pdf.covers.toast.reset: Cover removed. It will be rewritten from the bundled seed on the next app start.
pdf.covers.archive.export.success_with_m: Cover exported to {0}, but these images were not found on disk: {1}.
pdf.covers.archive.import.overwrite_mess: A cover named {0} already exists. Replace it with the version from the archive?
pdf.cover_images.info: Edit, add, or remove the logo and banner images cover templates reference from <AppRoot>/pdf/covers/images/. Seed images (formidable.svg) reappear from the bundled defaults on the next app start.
pdf.cover_images.list.title: Library
pdf.cover_images.list.empty: No images yet. Click Upload to add a logo or banner.
pdf.cover_images.confirm.delete_message: Delete the image {0}? This removes the file from disk.
pdf.cover_images.confirm.reset_message: Reset {0} to the bundled default? The file will be removed and rewritten on the next app start.
pdf.cover_images.toast.reset: Image {0} removed. It will be rewritten from the bundled seed on the next app start.
pdf.toast.export.browser_unreachable: Could not reach Chrome. Re-probe Chrome on the Information page, or reinstall if the binary moved.
pdf.toast.export.cover_logo_missing: Cover logo file not found. Drop the logo into pdf/covers/images/ or fix the cover.logo path.
pdf.toast.export.cover_template_invalid: The selected cover template is invalid. Open it and re-run validation; check the magic-line header.
pdf.toast.export.directive_invalid: A frontmatter directive has an invalid value. See the directive reference for accepted values.
pdf.toast.export.empty_markdown: The document body is empty after the frontmatter.
pdf.toast.export.engine_inactive: PDF engine is not active. Activate it on the Information page.
pdf.toast.export.html_conversion_failed: Markdown could not be converted to HTML. Check the document for malformed syntax.
pdf.toast.export.pdf_generation_failed: Chrome failed to produce the PDF. See Information → Logging for details.
pdf.toast.export.render_failed: Could not render the form's markdown. Check the template's handlebars/markdown for syntax errors.
pdf.toast.export.render_timeout: Rendering took too long. Try a smaller document or split it into parts.
pdf.toast.export.save_failed: Could not write the PDF to disk. Check the output folder and free space.
pdf.toast.export.signature_image_missing: Signature image not found. Fix the signature.image path or remove the signature block.
pdf.toast.export.style_not_found: The selected theme could not be loaded. Pick a different one, or check the custom CSS path.
